generated_oml:
@prefix DTDFVocab: https://w3id.org/DTDF# .

instance GantryPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position sensor in lab-scale gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance GantrySpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Speed sensor in lab-scale gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance GreenhouseTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor in greenhouse"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GreenhouseSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance GreenhouseHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensor in greenhouse"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GreenhouseSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GantryPositionSensor, GantrySpeedSensor
]

instance GreenhouseSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GreenhouseTemperatureSensor, GreenhouseHumiditySensor
]

instance RealTimeMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of indoor air quality for virus spread prevention"
]

instance ScenarioAnalysis : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Scenario analysis for indoor air quality management"
]

instance FutureStateForecasting : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Future state forecasting for indoor air quality management in virus spread prevention contexts"
]

instance TraceabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Traceability of historical data for system analysis"
]

instance ValidationStatus : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Status of continuous validation against physical system"
]

instance FaultDetected : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of faults in system operation"
]

instance ControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic control action for system operation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal control for system operation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAction
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging for traceability"
    DTDFVocab:provides TraceabilityInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data visualization for monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoring
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation against physical system behavior"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationStatus
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetected
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation capabilities for scenario analysis and future state forecasting"
    DTDFVocab:provides ScenarioAnalysis, FutureStateForecasting
]

instance InfluxDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for sensor data storage in GreenhouseDT"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, SimulationService
]

instance ActiveMQ : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Message broker for real-time communication between components in GreenhouseDT"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance VirtualMachines : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Virtualization technology for GreenhouseDT dissemination"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance GantrylibModule : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python C4 Containers bundled into gantrylib module for system modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, RealTimeVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization for deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, RealTimeVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing crane state data"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard-based data visualization tool"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Message broker for signaling between services"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance GitHub : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Version control system for all exemplars"
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Crane state data logged to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance GreenhouseSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series sensor data stored in InfluxDB for GreenhouseDT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GreenhouseSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDB
]

instance PhysicalGreenhouseBehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral adaptation model for physical greenhouse in GreenhouseDT system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GitHub
]

instance DigitalTwinBehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral adaptation model for digital twin counterpart in GreenhouseDT system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GitHub
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model-Driven digital twin engineering approach for Air Quality Management exemplar"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GitHub
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 Model used for architecture visualization of Lab Scale Gantry Crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GitHub
]

instance PhysicalGantryCrane : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane with mechanical structure and dedicated controller for reproducible digital twin research"
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python-based interface for physical to virtual data flow"
]

instance LoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Application for logging crane state data to TimescaleDB"
]

instance LaboratoryEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalGantryCrane, PhysicalCraneInterface, LoggingApplication
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands are generated by the Control Application and transmitted via the Physical Crane Interface to the physical crane."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system architecture is described using the C4 Model with context and container diagrams, featuring components including Physical Crane (actual system), Control Application, Trajectory Generator Service, and other software containers with defined interactions and dependencies."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The system uses an MQTT Broker for inter-service communication. Network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability, and security details are not specified in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The system is deployed on a personal computer with the Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard containers containerized using Docker. Computational requirements, scalability mechanisms, and other deployment specifics are not mentioned in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Air Quality Management exemplar adheres to AutomationML (an international standard for automation systems) for modeling the digital twin, while the Lab Scale Gantry Crane uses the C4 Model for architectural description. However, most exemplars adopt ad-hoc implementations without formal compliance to broader industry standards beyond these specific modeling tools."
]
